enriched_points.expanded_content: Historical GIS reveals significant shifts in land use over time, influenced by urbanization, agriculture, and socio-economic factors, particularly visible in Rădăuți.
Rădăuți serves as a prime example of historical land use dynamics, utilizing geospatial analysis of historical maps to document transformations in land cover.
Longitudinal studies leverage GIS techniques to track land use changes over decades, providing insights into ecological impacts and urban development patterns.
